message:
feat: complete frankensqlite migration across all modules with BEGIN CONCURRENT support

Migrate the entire codebase from rusqlite to frankensqlite as the primary
database backend, switching all dependencies from pinned git revisions to
local path dependencies for the franken ecosystem (frankensqlite, frankensearch,
franken_agent_detection, frankentui, asupersync, toon).

Storage layer (src/storage/sqlite.rs):
- Add LazyFrankenDb wrapper with lazy-open semantics matching LazyDb
- Add SendFrankenConnection newtype with unsafe Send impl for Mutex wrapping
- Implement FrankenConnectionManager with reader pool (round-robin, 4 readers)
  and token-based writer limit (bounded channel as counting semaphore)
- Add WriterGuard RAII type that auto-rollbacks uncommitted transactions on drop
  and releases the writer semaphore slot
- Implement FrankenStorage::insert_conversations_batched() — full analytics
  pipeline (token usage, message metrics, daily stats, hourly/daily rollups)
  in a single transaction, mirroring SqliteStorage's batched insert
- Add FrankenStorage::open_writer() for BEGIN CONCURRENT pool connections
- Add FrankenStorage::open_or_rebuild() with schema compatibility checking
- Add FrankenStorage::database_path() via PRAGMA database_list
- Enable concurrent_mode PRAGMA for MVCC multi-writer transactions
- Use let-chains to simplify nested if-let patterns throughout

Indexer (src/indexer/mod.rs):
- Add BEGIN CONCURRENT parallel writer support gated behind CASS_INDEXER_BEGIN_CONCURRENT env var
- Implement with_concurrent_retry() with jittered exponential backoff for
  BusySnapshot/WriteConflict/SerializationFailure transient errors
- Add persist_conversations_batched_begin_concurrent() using rayon par_chunks
  with per-chunk FrankenStorage writer connections and local agent/workspace caches
- Configurable via CASS_INDEXER_BEGIN_CONCURRENT_RETRIES (default 6),
  CASS_INDEXER_BEGIN_CONCURRENT_CHUNK_SIZE (default 32),
  CASS_INDEXER_BEGIN_CONCURRENT_WRITER_CACHE_KIB (default 4096)

Analytics (src/analytics/query.rs, validate.rs):
- Replace all rusqlite::Connection with frankensqlite::Connection
- Migrate from row.get::<_, T>() to row.get_typed::<T>() API
- Replace stmt.query_map() pattern with conn.query_map_collect()
- Use SUM(0) instead of bare 0 in grouped queries (frankensqlite requires
  all non-GROUP-BY columns to be aggregate expressions)
- Parse UsageBucket fields inline in query_map_collect closure

Search (src/search/query.rs, vector_index.rs, model_manager.rs):
- Add SendConnection newtype wrapping frankensqlite::Connection for SearchClient
- Add SemanticTierMode enum (Single/Progressive/FastOnly/QualityOnly) for
  two-tier semantic search via frankensearch's SyncTwoTierSearcher
- Add SemanticSearchState::load_in_memory_two_tier_index() with fallback
  to single-index fast-only mode
- Migrate SemanticFilterMaps::from_connection() from rusqlite to frankensqlite
- Replace Box<dyn rusqlite::ToSql> params with ParamValue in FTS and browse queries
- Replace stmt.query_map() with conn.query_map_collect() throughout

CLI (src/lib.rs):
- Add open_franken_analytics_db() helper for read-only analytics connections
- Replace LazyDb with LazyFrankenDb in state_meta_json()
- Wire SemanticTierMode through CLI flags (--two-tier, --fast-only, --quality-only)
- Add FrankenOpenFailed variant to lazy_db_to_cli_error mapping

Pages and bookmarks:
- Migrate summary.rs queries from JOIN to subquery pattern to work around
  frankensqlite's mixed aggregate/non-aggregate limitation
- Replace DATE() function with integer day_epoch computation in date histograms
- Use COALESCE-free Option<i64> patterns for SUM(LENGTH(content)) columns
- Reformat long closure/query lines for consistency

UI (src/ui/app.rs, analytics_charts.rs):
- Switch TUI analytics chart loading from SqliteStorage to FrankenStorage
- Migrate resolve_workspace_filter_ids from rusqlite stmt.query_row to
  frankensqlite conn.query_row_map
- Use search_semantic_with_tier() in TUI search service with env-gated
  CASS_TUI_TWO_TIER progressive mode
- Re-open with FrankenStorage after rusqlite rebuild_analytics() for data refresh

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
